## Description
Provide a clear description of the changes.

## Engineering Standards Checklist
- [ ] **No Bloat**: Does this PR add any unnecessary features, dependencies, or complexity?
- [ ] **Performance First**: Have you verified that this change does not degrade performance? (Ideally, it should improve it).
- [ ] **Memory Efficiency**: Does this change increase the RAM footprint?
- [ ] **SIMD/Optimization**: If applicable, have you used SIMD or other optimization techniques?

## Testing
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if necessary.
- [ ] Updated `PERFORMANCE.md` if performance characteristics changed.
